source: UCI Machine Learning Repository: Wine Quality
citation_ieee: P. Cortez, A. Cerdeira, F. Almeida, T. Matos, and J. Reis, "Modeling wine preferences by data mining from physicochemical properties," Decision Support Systems, vol. 47, no. 4, pp. 547-553, 2009.
wine_type_description: Added column identifying source dataset: red or white.
source_missing_values: No blank values detected in source CSV files; winequality.names states Missing Attribute Values: None.
interpretation_limits: Data concern Portuguese Vinho Verde wines and should not be generalized to all wines.
The dataset does not include grape variety, brand, price, vintage, or detailed production metadata.
quality is a sensory score and should be interpreted cautiously.
Correlations and linear regression do not prove causality.
The dataset is suitable for teaching analysis and visualization, not for a complete technological model of wine quality.
